data.name: 永恒幻境 Eternal Dreamland
data.detailed_description:
"EternalDreamland" is a third-person beautiful girl shooter development game.
There is only one person in the studio, I am still working hard to improve and optimize, I hope to be more understanding and tolerant, thank you!

Background of the story

The heroine is a 19-year-old high school student in the countryside, and after the end comes, she loses most of it
Memory, but she still remembers Hair Little Ruth, Senior Sister Hannah, and
And take refuge in Ruth's villa, in order to find his former friends, in a constant cycle with mutated creatures
Fight, rely on zombies to generate electricity, collect supplies, and fulfill their promise: go to the eternal city together!

Gameplay

-The heroine goes alone to find her former friends and takes them to a shelter
- The backpack can be opened at any time to change (obtained) clothing
- Explore freely, collect supplies, build and upgrade shelters, interact with friends and rest in shelters, etc
- Compatible mobile phones, computers
- Yoga, Dancing, Going to bed, Bathroom, Restore blood volume, reduce infection value
- Weapon attachments that can be used after unlocking, liveries

Fight enemies in close combat, capture zombies, and maintain the power of your shelter with zombie power generation
- Hand-to-hand combat increases the infection value even more
- Upgrade to increase the infection value and HP limit
- Random weather, dynamic time

Kill enemies or be executed (can be turned off)

What's in the plan

There is no trading system for the time being, and clothing or items cannot be sold, and the friend APP in the mobile phone
is an illustrated book, which may follow
Add a friend's dress-up, a friend's diary or career, and a friend's collectibles, which are not available in the current version

Indie game developer

Passionate about the game and wanting to create a better virtual world!
Hope you enjoy this game!

data.short_description: This is a third-person beautiful girl fighting zombie game. Elements such as shooting, changing clothes, and shelters are included. The heroine is a high school student in the countryside, in a constant cycle, looking for her former friends alone, and taking refuge in a small villa.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 18 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 18 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: It is forbidden for users to steal and crack this game through abnormal channels. All the names of the characters in this game are fictitious and any similarities are purely coincidental. The content of the game is fictional, please do not imitate it in reality, and minors should play selectively with their parents. If you feel unwell during playing, stop playing immediately and consult a physician.

  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 18 GB available space
